Collate operating system logs and diagnose system crashes.

choices: The maximum rate of sent packages

By implementing a Layer 3 Virtual Network Identifier (L3VNI) per VRR
Using manual configuration of access control lists (ACLs).

Cumulus 5.x and later / Spectrum-3 and later / On-premises deployment
Cumulus 5.x and later / Spectrum-2 and later / On-premises deployment
Cumulus 5.x and later / Spectrum-2 and later / LCM enabled

questions.question: How is congestion evaluated in an NVIDIA Spectrum-X system?
choices: By assessing the physical distance between network devices.
By monitoring the CPU and power usage of network devices.
By measuring the number of connected devices in the network.
By analyzing the egress queue loads ensuring all ports are well-balanced.

questions.question: Which of the following options correctly describes the difference between UFM Telemetry, UFM Enterprise, and UFM Cyber AI?
choices: UFM Telemetry provides real-time monitoring and analysis of network performance, UFM Enterprise focuses on network management and optimization, and UFM Cyber AI detects and mitigates network security threats.

UFM Telemetry provides real-time monitoring and analysis of network performance. UFM Enterprise detects and mitigates network security threats, and UFM Cyber AI focuses on network management and optimization.

UFM Telemetry detects and mitigates network security threats. UFM Enterprise provides real-time monitoring and analysis of network performance, and UFM Cyber AI focuses on network management and optimization.

UFM Telemetry focuses on network management and optimization, UFM Enterprise detects and mitigates network security threats, and UFM Cyber AI provides real-time monitoring and analysis of network performance.

You need to verify the effectiveness of this configuration and monitor its impact on network congestion. Which of the following partition key membership configurations would you implement to set up multi- tenancy in this environment?
choices: Assign full membership to both GPU servers and storage system.
Assign limited membership to both GPU servers and storage system.
Assign limited membership PKey to the shared storage system and full membership PKey to each tenant's GPU servers.
Assign full membership PKey to the shared storage system and limited membership PKey to each tenant's GPU servers.

AI workloads have very high entropy that helps spread traffic evenly without congestion.
Flow-based load balancing mechanisms increase congestion risk.

Enable the persistent manipulation of specific settings using both NVUE and flat-file approaches.

InfiniBand for both intra-node and inter-node GPU communication.
NVLink for intra-node GPU communication and InfiniBand for inter-node communication.
PCIe for intra-node GPU communication and RoCE for inter-node communication.

ECMP hash imbalance leading to flow polarization across limited paths
PFC misconfiguration causing selective packet drops
VLAN misconfiguration causing broadcast domain overlap

questions.question: During a distributed training workload, a network engineer notices that throughput drops significantly during synchronization phases, where all GPU nodes send updates to a central aggregation node. Monitoring tools indicate that switch buffer occupancy increases rapidly, and packet drops occur even though average network utilization is below capacity. What is the MOST likely explanation for this issue?
choices: ECMP imbalance causing uneven traffic distribution
Incast traffic pattern overwhelming switch buffers

questions.question: A RoCEv2-based data center network is experiencing periodic traffic stalls. Engineers observe that PFC pause frames are propagating across multiple switches, effectively halting traffic in certain parts of the fabric. Which condition MOST likely caused this behavior?
choices: ECN thresholds are set too aggressively, causing excessive marking
Congestion is triggering cascading PFC pauses across the network
RDMA is falling back to TCP

questions.question: A network architect is designing congestion management strategies for an AI fabric. The goal is to prevent packet loss while avoiding complete traffic stoppages that could lead to deadlocks. Which combination of technologies BEST achieves this goal?
choices: PFC only, configured on all priorities
ECN only, without any flow control
PFC combined with ECN, properly tuned

questions.question: A switch buffer is designed to handle bursts of traffic in an AI network. What is its PRIMARY purpose?
A network shows congestion signals but no packet drops. Performance is stable but slightly reduced. Which feature is MOST likely functioning correctly?
An AI workload requires minimal latency and CPU overhead for communication between nodes. Why is RDMA preferred over TCP in this scenario?
choices: It bypasses CPU and reduces latency

questions.question: An AI cluster using RDMA over RoCEv2 experiences significant performance degradation whenever even a small percentage of packet loss occurs. Why is RDMA particularly sensitive to packet loss in this environment?
choices: RDMA relies on TCP retransmissions for recovery
RDMA assumes a lossless fabric and lacks efficient retransmission mechanisms

questions.question: In a Leaf-Spine topology, one spine switch consistently experiences higher traffic load than others, even though all links are operational and evenly provisioned. Engineers suspect that traffic distribution is not optimal. What is the MOST likely cause?
choices: MTU mismatch causing selective packet drops
ECMP hashing behavior leading to uneven flow distribution
PFC preventing traffic on certain links

questions.question: An AI workload suffers from degraded performance due to out-of-order packet delivery. The network uses ECMP across multiple equal-cost paths. What is the MOST likely explanation for this issue?
choices: ECMP hashing inconsistencies causing packets of the same flow to take different paths

questions.question: During peak workloads, network monitoring shows a high number of ECN-marked packets, but no packet drops are observed. Application performance remains stable but slightly reduced. What is the expected behavior of the sending hosts in this situation?
choices: Increase sending rate to compensate for marking
Reduce sending rate in response to congestion signals

questions.question: A RoCE network experiences intermittent deadlocks where traffic stops across multiple switches. Investigation reveals that PFC is heavily utilized, but ECN is not configured. What is the BEST solution to prevent this issue?
choices: Enable ECN to complement PFC and reduce pause events

questions.question: Engineers observe head-of-line blocking in a RoCE network, where one blocked queue prevents others from progressing. Which mechanism is MOST likely responsible?
A new AI cluster is being designed with the goal of minimizing congestion and maximizing throughput across all nodes. What oversubscription ratio is MOST appropriate?
A network shows packet fragmentation and drops when traffic flows between nodes with different configurations. What is the MOST likely cause?

A data center architect is selecting a network topology for a large AI cluster requiring consistent latency and high scalability. The design must support thousands of GPU nodes with minimal congestion. Which architecture BEST meets these requirements?

A switch in an AI network frequently experiences buffer exhaustion during short bursts of high traffic. These bursts are not sustained, but they cause packet drops and temporary performance degradation. What is the MOST effective mitigation strategy?
choices: Increase buffer allocation and tune thresholds

questions.question: An AI cluster is configured with RoCEv1, but communication fails when traffic needs to traverse Layer 3 boundaries between subnets. What is the MOST likely reason for this behavior?
choices: RoCEv1 operates only at Layer 2 and does not support routing
TCP is required for inter-subnet communication

questions.question: A RoCE network is configured with a standard MTU of 1500 bytes. Performance testing shows higher CPU overhead and lower throughput than expected. Why is this configuration suboptimal?
choices: Smaller MTU increases overhead due to more packets

questions.question: A congestion control mechanism is required to dynamically adjust transmission rates based on network conditions in a RoCE environment. Which mechanism fulfills this role?
A network experiences intermittent latency spikes without packet loss. Traffic patterns show sudden bursts followed by idle periods. What is the MOST likely explanation?
A network engineer chooses cut-through switching for an AI workload to minimize latency. What is the PRIMARY advantage of this switching method?
choices: Reduced latency by forwarding packets before full reception

questions.question: However, in the same environment, what is a potential drawback of cut-through switching?
choices: Forwarding of corrupted packets without full validation

questions.question: In a multi-path AI network, one uplink consistently becomes congested while others remain underutilized. The topology and link capacities are identical. What is the MOST likely explanation?

During distributed training, latency spikes occur specifically when all nodes simultaneously send synchronization data. Packet drops are observed, and buffer utilization peaks. What is the MOST likely cause?
A data center operator wants to reduce CPU overhead on servers handling high-performance AI workloads and offload networking tasks. Which technology BEST achieves this objective?
Traffic monitoring reveals frequent microbursts in the network, characterized by sudden spikes in traffic over very short durations. What is the MOST likely consequence of this pattern?
choices: Buffer overflow leading to packet drops

questions.question: Cumulus Linux에서 RoCE를 활성화하는 NVUE 명령은?
choices: nv set qos roce enable on
nv set roce qos enable on

questions.question: InfiniBand fabric에서 Subnet Manager(SM)의 역할은?

ibstat 명령의 용도는?

Ansible로 자동화하기 좋은 Spectrum-X 작업은?
choices: VLAN 생성 및 RoCE QoS 설정

questions.question: RoCE 환경에서 패킷 드롭 없이 혼잡을 알리기 위해 사용하는 메커니즘은?
RoCEv2 무손실 네트워크에서 ECN과 PFC의 역할 관계로 가장 올바른 설명은?
choices: ECN은 예방적 혼잡 알림, PFC는 버퍼 임계 초과 시 최후의 Pause 제어
ECN과 PFC는 동일한 계층에서 중복 동작

questions.question: ib_write_bw 테스트에서 RDMA 장치를 지정하는 옵션은?

questions.question: GPUDirect RDMA의 핵심 이점은?

questions.question: UFM Cyber-AI 플랫폼이 수행하는 핵심 기능은?

questions.question: Spectrum-X에서 Adaptive Routing을 활성화하는 NVUE 명령은?
